title: LSEG says OpenAI tools shortened AI product cycles from months to weeks
friendlyTitle: LSEG says OpenAI tools sped up AI product work
summary: OpenAI published a case study on London Stock Exchange Group using ChatGPT Enterprise and OpenAI APIs to speed research, analytics, prototyping, and AI product delivery across financial data workflows.
friendlySummary: OpenAI shared how London Stock Exchange Group uses ChatGPT Enterprise and APIs for research, analytics, prototypes, and AI product delivery.
whyItMatters: The useful signal is not just faster drafting; it is faster movement from trusted data to decisions under governance. Regulated businesses are showing how AI adoption can be paired with compliance and release discipline.
friendlyWhyItMatters: The important signal is faster movement from trusted data to decisions while still working under governance and compliance rules.
